section.title: timestamp
section.para: Indicates when the modification recorded by a <change> was made.

Value description: Date in [ISO 8601] format, including milliseconds. The recommended pattern is YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ, where YYYY is the year (4 digits), MM is the month (2 digits), DD is the day (2 digits), hh is the hours (2 digits), mm is the minutes (2 digits), ss is the seconds (2 digits), sss is the milliseconds (3 digits), and Z indicates the time is UTC. For example: timestamp="2026-01-25T21:06:00.000Z".
section.programlisting: <unit id="1"> <pvn:provenance> <pvn:change agent="Google Translate" appliesTo="target" timestamp="2026-01-01T21:06:00.000Z"/> </pvn:provenance> <segment> <source>Your annual tax certificate is now available for download.</source> <target>O seu certificado anual de impostos está dispoñible para descarga.</target> </segment> </unit>
